name: io.github.kioie/aperture
title: Aperture
description: Budget-aware code context bundles for coding agents. Graph resonance with file citations.

tools.name: aperture_focus
tools.description: Build a token-budgeted code context bundle for a task. Returns file paths, line ranges, scores, and selection reasons.

tools.name: aperture_read_bundle
tools.description: Read source snippets from the most recent focus bundle with path:start-end citations.

tools.name: aperture_explain
tools.description: Explain per-symbol selection rationale from the most recent focus call.

tools.name: aperture_index
tools.description: Index a repository and return symbol graph stats (files, symbols, edges).
